system.description:
At 15th level, your myth takes on a new dimension. Choose a Legendary Fable, a transformation that marks your rise into full-fledged legend. This Legendary Fable grants you a passive feature and a new way to use your @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-class-features.Item.SdkTtahNdnXE8OEA]{Legend Dice}. It is not tied to your original @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-class-features.Item.EkMEmnhILgjLHDvF]{Mythic Fable} and you are also free to create new ones in cooperation with your game master.

Saves the World

Passive: You gain resistance to radiant and necrotic damage.

Legend Dice Feature — Heroic Defiance: When you would fail a saving throw, you can expend a Legend Die to reroll it as a reaction.

Avenges the Fallen

Passive: When an allied creature you can see is reduced to 0 HP by a hostile creature, you gain advantage on attack rolls against that creature until the end of your next turn.

Legend Dice Feature — Blood Oath: When a creature damages you or an ally, you can expend a Legend Die to mark them. Until the end of this creature’s next turn, any attacks against the marked creature are made with an expertise die, and damage against it can be rerolled, but you must take the new result.

Becomes the Flame

Passive: You emit bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for another 30 feet. You can suppress or resume this light as a bonus action.

Legend Dice Feature — Mythic Radiance: When you reduce a hostile creature to 0 HP, you can expend a Legend Die to cause all allies within 15 feet to regain hit points equal to twice the result.

Breaks the Chains

Passive: You gain immunity to the grappled and restrained conditions unless you choose to accept them.

Legend Dice Feature — Liberating Strike: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, you may expend a Legend Die to cause one creature of your choice (other than you) within 15 feet to immediately end one condition affecting it (except unconscious or doomed). You choose which condition ends.

Bears the Burden

Passive: You have advantage on Constitution Saving Throw and when you are healed in any manner, you regain the maximum hit point possible (for example if something heals you by 3d6, you regain 18 hit points).

Legend Dice Feature — Steadfast Legend: When you or an ally within 30 feet fails a saving throw, you can expend a Legend Die and add it to the result of the die.
